ground_truth.title: A Complete List of 'Check, Please! Bay Area' Restaurants A-Z
ground_truth.main_content:
Looking for a new way to see every restaurant featured on Check, Please! Bay Area? Visit our KQED Bay Area Restaurant Guide (now online in beta!), a robust tool highlighting more than 800 video-based restaurant reviews from the everyday people who appeared as guests on the show dating back 20 years.

Rather see a text-based list? Check out the comprehensive list of every restaurant ever featured on Check, Please! Bay Area below. Browse by region, re-watch your favorite segments, and enjoy food reviewed by regular Bay Area residents!
